title: crocodeilanthe simplex
side_effects: Crocodeilanthe simplex can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach pain, due to its high alkaloid content. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can also lead to allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Furthermore, the plant may interact with certain medications, including blood thinners and diabetes medications, resulting in adverse effects like bleeding or hypoglycemia. In severe cases, improper use of Crocodeilanthe simplex can even cause kidney damage and cardiovascular problems.
